name: particle-trace
description: Particle traces — streamline paths of tracked material. 'trace-name' selects the named trace, 'line'/'skip' control rendering, 'contour' colours along the path. The 'particle-trace-marker' variant draws marker-seeded traces with the same keywords.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Draw every Nth trace/marker to thin a dense field.
Select which named particle trace to draw.
Continuous contour colouring of a value, with display modifiers (above/below/log/ramp/...).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create particle-trace trace-name flow1 line on
common_usage_patterns.description: Render the 'flow1' particle trace as lines.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.
particle-trace-marker shares this exact keyword set (traces seeded from markers).
